onboarding.headline: Banking that speaks your
onboarding.subhead: Shaant, saaf, voice-friendly paisa — sabke liye. Bhejo, lo, samjho — bina shor ke.

send.trustStrip: Aapka transaction poori tarah safe hai.
send.speak: Aap {{name}} ko {{amount}} rupay bhej rahe hain
send.choosePay: Chunye aap kaise pay karna chahte hain.
send.qrHint: Camera ko UPI QR code par point karein

faqs.a: Paisa Bhejo dabao, person choose karo, amount daalo, phir confirm karo.
Haan. Har transaction bank-grade security se hota hai aur bhejne se pehle do baar confirm hota hai.
Paisa jaane se pehle confirmation screen aayega. Wahaan cancel kar sakte ho.
Haan. Golden mic dabao aur apni bhasha mein bolo.

voice.unsupported: Is device par voice available nahi hai

cards.title: Cards
cards.adjustLimit: Profile → Card settings mein change karein.

profile.title: Profile
profile.footerText: Sathi demo · No real money movement · v4

receive.title: Paise receive karein
receive.subhead: Yeh QR code dikhayein — koi bhi UPI app se aapko pay kar sakta hai.

history.title: History
history.searchPlaceholder: Name, category ya note se search karein

step0.title: Sathi mein Welcome
step0.text: Hi! Main aapki voice banking companion Sathi hoon. Chaliye, main aapko dikhati hoon ki is app ko kaise use karein!
step0.speak: Hi! Main aapki voice banking companion Sathi hoon. Chaliye, main aapko dikhati hoon ki is app ko kaise use karein!

step1.title: Aapka Bank Balance
step1.text: Yeh aapka balance card hai. Apna balance aur account number dekhne ya chipane ke liye eye button ko tap karein.
step1.speak: Yeh aapka balance card hai. Apna balance aur account number dekhne ya chipane ke liye eye button ko tap karein.

step2.title: Sathi se Baat Karein
step2.text: Yeh Sathi mic button hai. Is par tap karein aur paise bhejne, balance dekhne ya bill bharne ke liye apni language mein bolein.
step2.speak: Yeh Sathi mic button hai. Is par tap karein aur paise bhejne, balance dekhne ya bill bharne ke liye apni language mein bolein.

step3.title: Quick Actions
step3.text: Yahan se aap directly paise bhej sakte hain, QR code dikha sakte hain, bills bhar sakte hain ya history dekh sakte hain.
step3.speak: Yahan se aap directly paise bhej sakte hain, QR code dikha sakte hain, bills bhar sakte hain ya history dekh sakte hain.
